zh.lifeSummary: 當Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne於大約1227年出生時，他的父親Jean de BRIENNE58歲，母親Berenguela de CASTILLE48歲。他於大約1250年與Marie de Lusignan結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1270年8月25日在法國享年44歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne于大约1227年出生时，他的父亲Jean de BRIENNE58岁，母亲Berenguela de CASTILLE48岁。他于大约1250年与Marie de Lusignan结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1270年8月25日在法国享年44岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Alphonse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Spanish Alfonso, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin. It is probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready, prompt’. Alternatively, the first element may be ala ‘all’, hadu ‘struggle’, or hild ‘battle’ forms are found to support each derivation, so it is possible that several Visigothic names that were originally distinct have fallen together. The -ph- spelling is the result of classical influences (or classical pretensions). St Alphonsus was a 9th-century bishop of Astorga, who spent the last years of his life at the abbey of St Stephen de Ribas de Sil in Galicia. Alphonse has been occasionally used in the English-speaking world, especially among West Indians and African Americans. The Latinized form Alphonsus has been used in Ireland as an equivalent of the Gaelic name Anluan .

en.lifeSummary: When Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne was born about 1227, his father, Jean de BRIENNE, was 58 and his mother, Berenguela de CASTILLE, was 48. He married Marie de Lusignan about 1250. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 25 August 1270, in France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne est né environ 1227, son père, Jean de BRIENNE, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Berenguela de CASTILLE, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Lusignan environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 25 août 1270, à France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne um 1227 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de BRIENNE 58 und seine Mutter Berenguela de CASTILLE 48. Er hat um 1250 Marie de Lusignan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 25. August 1270 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne è nato il circa 1227, il suo padre, Jean de BRIENNE, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Berenguela de CASTILLE, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Lusignan circa 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 25 agosto 1270, nel Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienneが約1227年に生まれた時，父Jean de BRIENNEは58歳，母Berenguela de CASTILLEは48歳であった。約1250年にMarie de Lusignanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年8月25日にフランスで44歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne(이)가 대략 1227년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de BRIENNE(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Berenguela de CASTILLE(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 Marie de Lusignan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 8월 25일 프랑스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne nasceu aproximadamente 1227, seu pai, Jean de BRIENNE, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Berenguela de CASTILLE, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Lusignan aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1270, em França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne родился около 1227 г., его отцу по имени Jean de BRIENNE было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Berenguela de CASTILLE, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Lusignan около 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 25 августа 1270 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grand Chambrier Alphonse de Brienne nació aproximadamente 1227, su papá, Jean de BRIENNE, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Berenguela de CASTILLE, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Marie de Lusignan aproximadamente 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1270, en Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
